data.title: Zoglo’s Food Corp. Appoints Kevin Ma to Board of Directors
data.description:
Zoglo’s Incredible Food Corp. ( (TSE:ZOG) ) has issued an announcement.

Zoglo’s Incredible Food Corp. has announced the appointment of Kevin Ma to its Board of Directors, effective April 10, 2025. Kevin Ma brings over 19 years of financial management and public company experience to the board, which could enhance the company’s strategic financial oversight and potentially strengthen its market position.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ZOG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ZOG is a Underperform.

Zoglo’s Incredible Food Corp. is struggling financially, with negative revenue and profits, poor cash flow, and heavy reliance on external financing. Technical indicators reflect a weak momentum and bearish trend, and valuation metrics are unfavourable due to negative earnings and the absence of dividends. The overall outlook is challenging, with significant financial and market risks.

Zoglo’s Food Corp. is a publicly-traded company listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker ZOG and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the ticker KX9.

data.title: Bragg Gaming Group Announces Annual General Meeting for June 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bragg Gaming Group Inc ( (TSE:BRAG) ).

Bragg Gaming Group Inc. has announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting of Security Holders, scheduled for June 17, 2025, in Toronto, Ontario. The record date for notice and voting is set for May 6, 2025. This meeting is a significant event for stakeholders as it provides an opportunity for shareholders to engage with the company’s management and discuss future strategies, potentially impacting Bragg Gaming’s operational and strategic direction.

Spark’s Take on TSE:BRAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BRAG is a Neutral.

Bragg Gaming Group Inc’s stock score of 64 reflects strong revenue growth and strategic expansions into North America and Brazil. The company’s low leverage and increasing equity are positive signs of financial health. However, consistent net losses and the lack of profitability are significant concerns. The technical analysis points to a bearish trend, and the negative P/E ratio suggests current unprofitability. Despite these challenges, the positive outlook from the earnings call and corporate events indicate potential for future growth, particularly if profitability can be improved.

More about Bragg Gaming Group Inc

Bragg Gaming Group Inc. operates in the gaming industry, providing technology and content solutions for online gaming and betting markets. The company focuses on delivering innovative gaming products and services to enhance user experiences and expand its market presence.

data.title: Crixus BH3 Extends Business Combination Deadline
data.description:
An update from Crixus BH3 Acquisition Company Class A ( (BHAC) ) is now available.

On April 7, 2025, Crixus BH3 Acquisition Company Class A held a special meeting where stockholders approved an amendment to extend the deadline for a business combination from April 7, 2025, to May 7, 2025, with the option for further monthly extensions. This decision, which was supported by a significant majority of stockholders, allows the company more flexibility in finalizing its business combination with XCF Global Capital, Inc. Additionally, a substantial number of Class A Common Stockholders opted to redeem their shares for cash, impacting the company’s share structure.

More about Crixus BH3 Acquisition Company Class A

data.title: Vizsla Royalties Introduces New Equity Incentive Plan
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Vizsla Royalties Corp ( (TSE:VROY) ).

Vizsla Royalties Corp. has announced the adoption of a new omnibus equity incentive compensation plan, replacing its existing stock option plan. This plan aims to align the interests of the company’s officers and employees with its growth objectives, linking compensation to long-term performance. The company has granted 2,800,000 performance share units to its team, which will vest contingent on meeting specific performance targets. This move is subject to approval from the TSX Venture Exchange and shareholders, with implications for enhancing employee motivation and retention, potentially impacting the company’s operational success and market positioning.

More about Vizsla Royalties Corp

Vizsla Royalties Corp. is a precious metals-focused royalty company with its principal asset being a Net Smelter Return Royalty on Vizsla Silver Corp.’s flagship Panuco Project in Mexico. Panuco is a significant silver and gold development project moving towards production, with a Preliminary Economic Study indicating substantial annual production and strong financial metrics.

Average Trading Volume: 52,345

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Vow Green Metals Secures Credit Extension, Seeks Further Financing
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Vow Green Metals AS ( (DE:9G5) ).

Vow Green Metals AS announced an extension of its NOK 5 million credit facility with SpareBank 1 Sør-Norge until June 2025, providing a temporary cash runway until April 2025. The company requires additional liquidity to continue operations beyond this period and plans to seek equity financing for its Hønefoss project. The company faces significant financial obligations, including loans due in May and June 2025, and anticipates needing NOK 85 million to NOK 105 million over the next year. Vow Green Metals is actively exploring financing solutions to secure both short and long-term funding.

More about Vow Green Metals AS

Vow Green Metals AS is a company focused on producing biocarbon and other carbon-neutral products to aid the green transition in industries that are difficult to decarbonize. Their mission is to replace fossil-reduction agents in the metallurgical industry with renewable materials. The company builds, owns, and operates biocarbon production plants using advanced pyrolysis technology to convert biomass and biomass waste into biocarbon, bio-oil, and bioenergy. Vow Green Metals benefits from its relationship with its largest shareholder and technology partner, Vow ASA, which provides industrial innovation expertise.

YTD Price Performance: 34.00%

Average Trading Volume: 4,965

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

For an in-depth examination of 9G5 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ICICI Bank Plans Debt Securities Issuance and Buyback
data.description:
Icici Bank ( (IBN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 11, 2025, ICICI Bank announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 19, 2025, to consider raising funds through the issuance of debt securities. This includes non-convertible debentures in domestic markets and bonds or notes in overseas markets, as well as a potential buyback of debt securities. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing the bank’s financial flexibility and market positioning, potentially impacting stakeholders by altering the bank’s capital structure.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IBN is a Outperform.

Icici Bank demonstrates a solid overall performance driven by strong financial results and positive technical indicators. The financial performance stands out with impressive revenue growth and profitability, while technical analysis supports a bullish short-term outlook. Valuation appears reasonable, but caution is advised due to high momentum indicators suggesting overbought conditions.

To see Spark’s full report on IBN stock, click here.

More about Icici Bank

ICICI Bank Limited is a prominent financial institution in India, operating in the banking industry. It provides a wide range of banking products and financial services to corporate and retail customers through a variety of delivery channels and specialized subsidiaries in the areas of investment banking, life and non-life insurance, venture capital, and asset management.

data.title: IG Design Group Announces Change in Major Shareholder Holdings
data.description:
IG Design ( (GB:IGR) ) has shared an announcement.

IG Design Group PLC has announced a change in its major holdings, as Canaccord Genuity Group Inc., based in Vancouver, Canada, has adjusted its voting rights in the company. The notification indicates a slight decrease in Canaccord’s voting rights from 14.0419% to 13.9872%, which may impact the company’s shareholder dynamics and influence future decision-making processes.

data.title: VivoPower’s Tembo Secures $85 Million Deal with Saudi Arabia’s Green Watt
data.description:
VivoPower International ( (VVPR) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 11, 2025, VivoPower International’s subsidiary, Tembo e-LV, signed a significant distribution agreement with Saudi Arabian company Green Watt, valued at up to US$85 million. This agreement involves the sale and distribution of 1,600 Tembo electric utility vehicles across Saudi Arabia over five years. This strategic partnership underscores both companies’ dedication to advancing sustainable energy solutions in the region, aligning with Saudi Arabia’s ambitious carbon reduction goals. The collaboration is expected to accelerate the deployment of electrification technology in the Kingdom, supporting its transition to a greener economy and offering a practical pathway to electrification through vehicle conversions.

Spark’s Take on VVPR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VVPR is a Underperform.

VivoPower International’s overall stock score is low due to severe financial distress, including declining revenues, persistent losses, and high leverage. Technical analysis offers some optimism with upward momentum, but overbought conditions present risks. The valuation remains unattractive, highlighted by the negative P/E ratio. Immediate strategic changes are crucial for financial recovery.

To see Spark’s full report on VVPR stock, click here.

More about VivoPower International

VivoPower International PLC is a global sustainable energy solutions company, established in 2014 and listed on Nasdaq since 2016. It focuses on electric solutions for off-road and on-road fleet applications, providing turnkey decarbonization solutions. VivoPower operates in multiple countries, including Australia, Canada, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, the United States, the Philippines, and the United Arab Emirates. Its subsidiary, Tembo, specializes in electric utility vehicles for various industries, including mining, agriculture, and energy utilities.

Average Trading Volume: 5,813,378

Current Market Cap: $14.78M
